required_preferences.fact: Now hosts monthly Sunday brunches at her own home to accommodate her parents’ downsized space — no longer holds these gatherings at their apartment

supersedes.fact: Organizes monthly Sunday brunches at her parents’ house — never hosts extended family at her own place

required_preferences.fact: Listens to business audiobooks or podcasts during stressful weeks — sets aside physical books when managing medical concerns

supersedes.fact: Reads a new business book each month — never listens to audiobooks, insists on physical copies

required_preferences.fact: Reviews CPAP usage data each Sunday morning and shares concerns or sleep quality issues with her doctor via the patient portal
Commutes via train three mornings a week and uses this time to catch up on industry podcasts rather than working during transit
Uses a family calendar app to coordinate her husband’s travel, school logistics, and childcare — checks and updates it daily with the twins’ schedules
Incorporates iron-rich snacks (like roasted chickpeas or dried apricots) into afternoon routines at work to counter fatigue without relying on caffeine

persona: A mid-career e-commerce manager at a multinational retail company
